title: Pure function rebuilt every render
message: `renderItem` inside `CompanionMemoryTimeline` uses no local state but is rebuilt on every render, so it wastes work & breaks memoized children. Move it to the top of the file, outside the component.
help: Move the function above the component, at the top of the file. It doesn't use local state, so rebuilding it each update is wasted work.
